code:
class Node:
    def __init__(self, data):
        self.data = data
        self.next = None

class CircularLinkedList:
    def __init__(self):
        self.head = None

    def is_empty(self):
        return self.head is None

    def append(self, data):
        new_node = Node(data)
        if self.is_empty():
            self.head = new_node
            new_node.next = self.head  # Points to itself
        else:
            current = self.head
            while current.next != self.head:
                current = current.next
            current.next = new_node
            new_node.next = self.head

    def prepend(self, data):
        new_node = Node(data)
        if self.is_empty():
            self.head = new_node
            new_node.next = self.head
        else:
            current = self.head
            while current.next != self.head:
                current = current.next
            new_node.next = self.head
            self.head = new_node
            current.next = self.head # Last node points to the new head

    def delete(self, key):
        if self.is_empty():
            return

        # If head itself holds the key
        if self.head.data == key:
            if self.head.next == self.head:  # Single node in the list
                self.head = None
            else:
                current = self.head
                while current.next != self.head: # Find the last node
                    current = current.next
                current.next = self.head.next
                self.head = self.head.next
            return

        # Traverse to find the node and delete it
        prev = None
        current = self.head
        while current.next != self.head:
            prev = current
            current = current.next
            if current.data == key:
                prev.next = current.next
                return

    def display(self):
        if self.is_empty():
            print("Liste boş.")
            return

        elements = []
        current = self.head
        while True:
            elements.append(str(current.data))
            current = current.next
            if current == self.head:
                break
        print(" -> ".join(elements))

    def find(self, key):
        if self.is_empty():
            return False

        current = self.head
        while True:
            if current.data == key:
                return True
            current = current.next
            if current == self.head:
                break
        return False


if __name__ == '__main__':
    cll = CircularLinkedList()

    cll.append(10)
    cll.append(20)
    cll.append(30)
    print("Oluşturulan liste:")
    cll.display()

    cll.prepend(5)
    print("5 eklendikten sonra:")
    cll.display()

    cll.delete(30)
    print("30 silindikten sonra:")
    cll.display()

    cll.delete(5)
    print("5 silindikten sonra:")
    cll.display()

    cll.append(40)
    cll.append(50)
    print("40 ve 50 eklendikten sonra:")
    cll.display()

    cll.delete(10)
    print("10 silindikten sonra:")
    cll.display()

    print(f"20 listede mi? {cll.find(20)}")
    print(f"100 listede mi? {cll.find(100)}")

    cll.delete(20)
    cll.delete(40)
    cll.delete(50)
    print("Tüm elemanlar silindikten sonra:")
    cll.display()

    cll.append(100)
    print("100 eklendikten sonra:")
    cll.display()
